entities.name: Job Seekers

entities.name: B2C Job Seeker Monetization
entities.context: Business model V rejects as ethically problematic and strategically challenging

entities.name: Career Tools Space
entities.context: Market/industry where tools targeting job seekers tend toward mediocrity due to monetization constraints

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, implicitly positioned as avoiding the B2C job seeker model

relationships.context: The model targets a demographic unable to pay
Tools in this space get locked into mediocrity when dependent on job seeker revenue
